macro.title: US-Iran Tensions Ease
macro.body: The easing of US-Iran tensions may lead to a decrease in oil prices, which could have a positive impact on the global economy. However, the situation remains volatile, and any escalation could lead to increased market uncertainty.
macro.bull: A decrease in oil prices could lead to increased consumer spending and economic growth.
macro.base: The current situation may lead to a stable oil price, with minimal impact on the global economy.
macro.bear: An escalation of US-Iran tensions could lead to increased oil prices, negatively impacting the global economy.

macro.title: Inflation Pressures
macro.body: Inflation pressures remain a concern, with the potential for increased interest rates. This could lead to a decrease in consumer spending and economic growth.
macro.bull: A decrease in inflation pressures could lead to decreased interest rates, positively impacting the economy.
macro.base: The current inflation rate may remain stable, with minimal impact on the economy.
macro.bear: An increase in inflation pressures could lead to increased interest rates, negatively impacting the economy.

macro.title: Sector Rotations
macro.body: Sector rotations may lead to a shift in investor sentiment, with some sectors performing better than others.
macro.bull: A rotation into growth sectors could lead to increased portfolio value.
macro.base: The current sector rotation may have minimal impact on the portfolio.
macro.bear: A rotation out of growth sectors could lead to decreased portfolio value.

risks.title: 3x Leverage Amplification
risks.body: The 3x leverage amplification in the portfolio increases the potential for significant gains, but also increases the risk of significant losses.

risks.title: FX Book Rate Drag
risks.body: The FX book rate drag may negatively impact the portfolio if the CAD strengthens against the USD.

risks.title: VIX Decay Risk
risks.body: The VIX decay risk may lead to a decrease in portfolio value if the VIX remains elevated.

news.headline: Comcast's NBCUniversal Spinoff
news.body: The spinoff may lead to increased M&A activity in the sector, potentially positively impacting the portfolio.
news.exposure: None directly, but may impact MSFT, AAPL, or other tech holdings

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: Increased M&A activity leads to a surge in tech stocks.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: The spinoff leads to increased competition, negatively impacting the portfolio.

news.headline: Eli Lilly Selected for FDA Initiative
news.body: The selection may lead to increased investor sentiment in the healthcare sector.
news.exposure: None directly, but may impact the broader market

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: Increased investor sentiment leads to a surge in healthcare stocks.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: The selection has minimal impact on the portfolio.

news.headline: Kalshi Traders Expect Disappointing Jobs Report
news.body: The disappointing jobs report may lead to decreased investor sentiment, negatively impacting the portfolio.
news.exposure: FNGU, SPXL ~ $87K CAD (3x leverage), SPXL ~ $22K CAD

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: The jobs report is better than expected, leading to a surge in stocks.

outcomes.label: Base
outcomes.scenario: The jobs report is as expected, with minimal impact on the portfolio.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: The jobs report is disappointing, leading to a decrease in stocks.

picks.thesis: Costco's use of AI to triple digital traffic and lift conversions may lead to increased investor sentiment and a surge in the stock price.
ADI's strong cash flow and inventory strategy may lead to increased investor sentiment and a surge in the stock price.
picks.entry: Monitor for entry on a pullback to $100-$110

strengths.text: Diversified portfolio with a mix of sectors and asset classes
Strong growth potential in the tech sector
Established company with a strong track record of growth
Well-established brand with a loyal customer base
Tax-efficient use of RRSP and TFSA accounts

concerns.text: High exposure to the tech sector, which may be volatile
Volatility in the stock price may lead to significant losses
Regulatory risks may impact the stock price
FX book rate drag may negatively impact the portfolio
VIX decay risk may lead to a decrease in portfolio value

strategy_short.text: Monitor the jobs report and adjust the portfolio accordingly
Keep an eye on the US-Iran tensions and adjust the portfolio if necessary
Consider adding to the tech sector on a pullback

strategy_mid.text: Continue to diversify the portfolio and reduce exposure to the tech sector
Monitor the interest rates and adjust the portfolio accordingly
Consider adding to the healthcare sector on a pullback

strategy_long.text: Continue to invest in the tech sector for long-term growth
Diversify the portfolio and reduce exposure to the tech sector
Consider adding to the renewable energy sector for long-term growth

daily_outlook: The portfolio is well-positioned for long-term growth, but may experience short-term volatility due to the US-Iran tensions and the jobs report.
